scripts.build:zip: tsc && powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/deductStamina.js -DestinationPath deductStamina.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/startQuizSession.js -DestinationPath startQuizSession.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/recordPlayerInfo.js -DestinationPath recordPlayerInfo.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/abandonQuizSession.js -DestinationPath abandonQuizSession.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/pauseSession.js -DestinationPath pauseSession.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path dist/quiz-functions/resumeSession.js -DestinationPath resumeSession.zip -Force"
